ddls:
CREATE TABLE "options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option trade */,
  "near_term_strike" REAL /* Near-term strike price of the option */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* Type of option (e.g., Put, Call) */,
  "midpoint_price" REAL /* Midpoint price of the option */,
  "delta_k" REAL /* Delta-K value of the option */,
  "contribution_by_strike" REAL /* Contribution by strike price */,
  "underlying_asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the underlying asset (e.g., stock, index) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the option expires */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price of the option */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Current bid price for the option */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* Current ask price for the option */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the option traded in the market */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest for the option */,
  "implied_volatility" REAL /* Implied volatility of the option */,
  "last_traded_price" REAL /* Last traded price of the option */,
  "last_traded_date" TEXT /* Date of the last trade */,
  "last_traded_time" TEXT /* Time of the last trade */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time the trade was executed */,
  "market_price" REAL /* Market price of the option at the time of trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trade_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of options traded */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio associated with the trade */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, risk manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user managing the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the portfolio is active */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "total_risk" REAL /* Total risk exposure of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio holding the position */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option held in the position */,
  "position_size" INTEGER /* Size of the position */,
  "entry_price" REAL /* Price at which the position was entered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the position was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the position was last updated */,
  "exit_price" REAL /* Price at which the position was exited */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date of the exit */,
  "exit_time" TEXT /* Time of the exit */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the position */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the position (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_exposures" (
  "risk_exposure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk exposure */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio with the risk exposure */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option contributing to the risk exposure */,
  "risk_type" TEXT /* Type of risk (e.g., market risk, credit risk) */,
  "risk_value" REAL /* Value of the risk exposure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the risk exposure was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the risk exposure was last updated */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the risk exposure */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the risk exposure data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_exposure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_exposures_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_exposures_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option associated with the market data */,
  "market_price" REAL /* Market price of the option */,
  "market_date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "market_time" TEXT /* Time of the market data */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the option traded at the market price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the option */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the option during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the option during the period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics result */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio for which the analytics were generated */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option associated with the analytics */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., delta, gamma, vega) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics were generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics were last updated */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the analytics data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)
